name: shoot-and-scale-content-system
description: Shoot & Scale's content engine. Seven skills — onboarding, snapshot, bullseye, analyze, create-format, produce, revise — take a client from setup to ready-to-shoot scripts. Per-client living docs, a dated analysis-JSON archive, a living Idea Bank Word doc (used-once), backups, and a confirmed-shot model: the client reviews by highlighting, the videographer notes each SHOT STATUS box, and Shot-History logs only what was actually shot. Formats are bank-only; runs on Sandcastles.
